# Motebit

> Cryptographic identity for AI agents. Ed25519 keypairs, signed identity files, governance policy, and portable memory that travel with the agent across devices, providers, and time.

Motebit is the missing identity layer for the agentic economy. MCP defines what tools an agent can reach. Motebit defines who the agent is.

A motebit is a persistent, cryptographically-anchored, sovereign agent. The intelligence provider is pluggable. The identity — with its accumulated memory, trust, and governance — is the asset.

## Quick Start

- `npm create motebit` generates a signed agent identity in 30 seconds
- `@motebit/crypto` signs and verifies any Motebit artifact (identity files, receipts, credentials)
- `motebit/identity@1.0` is the open specification (Apache-2.0 licensed)

## Concepts

- [Introduction](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/introduction): What is motebit, and why does it exist.
- [Identity](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/concepts/identity): Cryptographic identity that persists across time, devices, and providers.
- [Memory](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/concepts/memory): Semantic memory that accumulates, decays, and respects sensitivity.
- [Intelligence](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/concepts/intelligence): Pluggable LLM providers — the intelligence is a commodity, the identity is the asset.
- [Governance](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/concepts/governance): Surface tension — what crosses the boundary between the agent and the world.
- [The Droplet](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/concepts/the-droplet): Form thesis — surface tension, glass, breathing, orbital mechanics.

## Getting Started

- [Get Your Agent](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/get-your-agent): Download the desktop app, create an identity, and meet your motebit.
- [Configuration](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/apps/configuration): Config files, environment variables, models, and MCP servers.

## Apps

- [Desktop App](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/apps/desktop): Setup, operator mode, PIN flow, and the Tauri runtime.
- [Mobile App](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/apps/mobile): Expo setup, dual providers, voice input, goals, and MCP trust.
- [CLI](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/apps/cli): The developer REPL — slash commands, streaming, and debugging.
- [Spatial App](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/apps/spatial): WebXR, orbital mechanics, hand tracking, and flat preview.

## Developer Guide

- [Identity Standard](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/developer/identity-standard): Create and verify motebit.md agent identity files — the motebit/identity@1.0 specification.
- [Identity & Cryptography](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/developer/identity-crypto): How motebit creates and manages persistent sovereign identity.
- [Agent-to-Agent Delegation](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/developer/delegation): Discover, verify, delegate, and prove — the cryptographic protocol for agent collaboration.
- [Tools](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/developer/tools): Built-in tools, MCP integration, and the trust model.
- [MCP Server Mode](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/developer/mcp-server): Expose your motebit as a callable agent — synthetic tools, signed receipts, and bearer auth.

## Operator Guide

- [Architecture](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/operator/architecture): Monorepo structure, package layers, and data flow.
- [Daemon Mode & Approvals](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/operator/daemon-approvals): Running motebit as a daemon — scheduled goals, approval queue, and governance enforcement.
- [Policy & Governance](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/operator/governance): How motebit controls what crosses the surface.
- [Sync](https://docs.motebit.com/docs/operator/sync): Multi-device sync, the relay server, and conflict detection.

## Open Specification

- [motebit/identity@1.0](https://github.com/motebit/motebit/blob/main/spec/identity-v1.md): The open specification for agent identity files. Apache-2.0 licensed.

## Packages

- [create-motebit](https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-motebit): CLI scaffolder — `npm create motebit`. Apache-2.0 licensed.
- [@motebit/crypto](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@motebit/crypto): Sign and verify every Motebit artifact. Cryptosuite-agile for post-quantum. Apache-2.0 licensed.

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/motebit/motebit): Source code, issue tracker, discussions.
- [DROPLET.md](https://github.com/motebit/motebit/blob/main/DROPLET.md): Design thesis — the body derived from physics.
- [THE_SOVEREIGN_INTERIOR.md](https://github.com/motebit/motebit/blob/main/THE_SOVEREIGN_INTERIOR.md): Identity thesis — cryptographic interior.
- [LIQUESCENTIA.md](https://github.com/motebit/motebit/blob/main/LIQUESCENTIA.md): The world — the medium that permits cohesion.
- [THE_MUSIC_OF_THE_MEDIUM.md](https://github.com/motebit/motebit/blob/main/THE_MUSIC_OF_THE_MEDIUM.md): Acoustic interface — pressure coupling through surface tension.
- [THE_METABOLIC_PRINCIPLE.md](https://github.com/motebit/motebit/blob/main/THE_METABOLIC_PRINCIPLE.md): Build enzymes, absorb glucose.
